title: Project Title
subtitle: One-line description of the project
description: A few paragraphs describing what this project is about. What's the vision? What problem does it solve? What makes it different?
problem: The core user, product, or systems problem this project addresses.
solution: The approach, product direction, or system design used to address the problem.
role: Your role and ownership on the project.
proof: A short evidence statement or outcome that shows why the work matters.
impactSummary: Why does this project matter? What's the real-world impact? How does it affect users or the business?

image.label: Hero image label
image.alt: Descriptive alt text for the project hero image

images.label: Supporting image label
images.alt: Descriptive alt text for the supporting image
images.caption: Optional caption for this image.

sections.title: Section Title
paragraphs: First paragraph of context explaining the background.

pullQuote.text: Optional important quote or problem statement

sections.title: The questions we had to answer

decisions.title: Decision question here?
decisions.teaser: Brief teaser of what this decision was about
decisions.answer: Detailed explanation of how you solved it and why you chose this approach

callout.text: Important insight about your architectural decisions

designDecision.title: Key Design Decision Name
designDecision.description: What this design decision is and why it matters
designDecision.why: The business or technical reasoning behind this choice

constraints.title: Constraint name
constraints.description: What this constraint is and why it was challenging

sections.title: What we chose not to do and why

tradeoffs.title: Feature we didn't build
tradeoffs.whatWeChose: What you chose to do instead
tradeoffs.whatItCost: The trade-off or limitation of your choice
tradeoffs.whenWeReconsider: Under what conditions you would reconsider

reflections.insight: Key insight from the project that might have taken time or was surprising
reflections.transferable: What this means for other projects or general application

sections.title: The work ahead
sections.intro: Narrative introduction to what comes next

items.title: Next focus area 1
items.description: What you're planning to work on next
